description.content: Base URL of the running Library API. Defaults to a Prism mock on :4010 to mirror the OpenAPI sample's servers[0].url.
Book id used by the GET /books/{id} request. Prism will return an example matching the schema; against a real backend, seed this id first or chain from the POST /books response.

Self-contained 3-request Postman collection bundled with mk-qa-master v0.6.1 for dogfooding the Newman runner. Targets the same fictional Library API as the OpenAPI sample (`openapi.yaml`). Each request has `pm.test(...)` assertions covering happy-path status code + response shape. Use `{{baseUrl}}` to point at a Prism mock (`prism mock examples/sample_api_project/openapi.yaml`) or your own staging server.
